params.SpellDescription: You and target opponent each flip a coin. CARDNAME deals 1 damage to each player whose coin comes up tails. Repeat this process until both players' coins come up heads on the same flip.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: You and target opponent each flip a coin. CARDNAME deals 1 damage to each player whose coin comes up tails. Repeat this process until both players' coins come up heads on the same flip.
